description:
You are an Engineering Manager at a software company shipping a major product release. Log in to Rocket.Chat:
- Username: admin
- Password: Admin1234!

Your release channels show that v4.0 is currently blocked by issues across three different teams. The release was supposed to go out yesterday. Each team lead believes their blocker is someone else's responsibility. Sales has already communicated the release date to key customers. Your VP is asking for a status update.

Diagnose the actual blockers for the v4.0 release from channel discussions, assign ownership and resolution deadlines, coordinate a go/no-go decision, and provide a revised timeline update to stakeholders.
